structural_findings: 100 records reduce to ~46 distinct concepts; cross-batch duplication is systematic and is direct evidence of obviousness for the 3-5x convergent clusters.

China-primary coverage collapses under dedup: only B-01 survives as CN-first PROMOTE (B-06/B-14/B-22 as FIX); satisfy US/China quotas via explicit CN chapters inside merged dual-market canonicals, not by resurrecting rejected B seeds.
Portfolio skew toward test/instrumentation and AI-datacenter-correlated demand; cap datacenter-correlated picks and balance instruments vs subsystems at freeze.

Windows likely closed before 2030 (rejected): C-18, A-20/E-06, B-15. Windows likely post-2034 (rejected or option-gated): D-04, D-06, D-16, D-11.
